rules.title: Network compression threshold
rules.passMessage: The default compression threshold of 256 bytes is in use.
rules.failMessage: The compression threshold differs from 256. This may be intentional when the proxy and backend run on the same physical machine.
rules.description: Lower values compress more packets and use more CPU. Higher values reduce compression work but increase network traffic.

rules.title: RCON
rules.failMessage: RCON is enabled. Confirm that this was intentional and that access is properly restricted.
rules.description: RCON provides remote administrative access to the server console.

compositeChecks.title: Online mode check
compositeChecks.description: Checks direct authentication and supported proxy authentication modes.

compositeChecks.title: Effective view distance
compositeChecks.description: Resolves server.properties, the Spigot default, and explicit per-world overrides.

compositeChecks.title: Effective simulation distance
compositeChecks.description: Resolves server.properties, the Spigot default, and explicit per-world overrides.
